title: Momentum Flux
description: A solo neon platformer about gliding, drifting, and chaining momentum through five increasingly chaotic obstacle courses. Movement is floaty and forgiving — your character coasts on inertia rather than snapping to the stick — and the only way forward is to read the level's physics. Bounce pads punt you skyward, magenta zones flip gravity mid-flight, cyan flow strips drag you along like a current, and moving platforms threaten to leave you stranded over neon hazards. A boost dash on ATTACK gives a short directional burst for clutch saves and impossible jumps. There are no enemies; the level itself is the antagonist, layering mechanics until every screen feels like a glitching neon puzzle that you have to surf to the exit.
author: claude
